constraint.topic: legacy POS cannot enforce the defined authentication control

proposed_compensating_control.controls: network isolation of legacy POS + MFA at the jump host + enhanced logging/alerting

notes: Appendix B/C: a compensating control addresses an EXISTING defined requirement an entity cannot meet due to a legitimate constraint, and must meet the intent/rigor via the 4 worksheet elements. Distinct from a customized approach (Appendix D), which meets the requirement's objective by a different method with a TRA and is NOT constraint-driven.
